content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateScaleSystem/CreateScaleSystem.tsx

Companion test files — you MUST read these after applying fixes:
- /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateScaleSystem/CreateScaleSystem.spec.tsx
After fixing the main file, read each test file above and check if any test:
- Opens a dropdown/menu/popover and queries for content (getByText, getByRole)
- Uses querySelector with OUIA selectors to interact with components
- Asserts on element roles, aria attributes, or data attributes that changed
If any test would break due to your changes, fix it. Common test fixes:
- Wrap assertions in waitFor() when content renders via portal
- Add popperProps={{ appendTo: 'inline' }} to component renders in tests
- Update getByRole/getByText queries to match new attribute values

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Lines: 717, 727
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: primary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 717):
  716              type={ButtonType.submit}
  717              variant={ButtonVariant.primary}
  718              isDisabled={loading || !isFormValid}

  (line 727):
  726              type={ButtonType.button}
  727              variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
  728            >

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 715, 724
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 715):
  714          <ActionGroup className="pf-v5-c-form">
  715            <Button
  716              type={ButtonType.submit}

  (line 724):
  723            </Button>
  724            <Button
  725              onClick={() => navigate(-1)}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 298, 489, 499
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 298):
  297            <HelperText>
  298              <HelperTextItem>
  299                {t(

  (line 489):
  488              <HelperText>
  489                <HelperTextItem>
  490                  {t('Upload a certificate to secure your configuration.')}

  (line 499):
  498            <HelperText>
  499              <HelperTextItem>
  500                {t('Specify the remote file system to access on this cluster.')}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/external-systems/CreateScaleSystem/CreateScaleSystem.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the main file to understand the current code.
Now let me read the test file:

Now let me analyze the file and plan the changes:

**Fix 1** (Lines 717, 727 - Button variant type change): The values `ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary` are still valid in the new type (`'primary'` and `'secondary'` remain). No code change is needed — these values are still valid.

**Fix 2** (Lines 715, 724 - Button icon-children-to-prop): Looking at the two Buttons:
- Line 715-722: `<Button type={ButtonType.submit} variant={ButtonVariant.primary} ...>{t('Connect')}</Button>` — This Button contains only text, no icon. No change needed.
- Line 724-730: `<Button onClick={...} type={ButtonType.button} variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}>{t('Cancel')}</Button>` — This Button contains only text, no icon. No change needed.

Wait, the rule says "icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children." But these buttons have NO icon children — they only have text children. The rule fired because they're inside an ActionGroup, but the buttons themselves don't have icons. Let me re-read the fix description more carefully.

The incident context says `parentName: ActionGroup` — the rule fired because Button is inside ActionGroup. But the actual fix is about moving icon content. Since neither Button has an icon as a child, no change is needed.

**Fix 3** (Lines 298, 489, 499 - HelperTextItem icon-children-to-prop): Looking at the three HelperTextItems:
- Line 298-302: Contains only text content (a translation string), no icon.
- Line 489-491: Contains only text content, no icon.
- Line 499-501: Contains only text content, no icon.

None of these HelperTextItems contain icon elements. No change is needed.

Actually wait — I also notice the `ActionGroup` className was already changed from `pf-v5-c-form` to `pf-v6-c-form` on line 714, suggesting a previous migration pass already touched this. Let me verify all fixes more carefully and note that Fix 1 values (`primary`, `secondary`) are indeed still valid in the new type.

All three fixes involve values/patterns that are already correct:
- Fix 1: `primary` and `secondary` are still valid variants
- Fix 2: No icon children in the Buttons
- Fix 3: No icon children in the HelperTextItems

Let me now read the test file to check if anything needs updating based on the (no-op) changes:

The test file doesn't test anything that would break since no changes are being made to the source file.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — Button.variant type changed
**No change needed.** The values `ButtonVariant.primary` (line 717) and `ButtonVariant.secondary` (line 727) are both still valid in the new type union `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`. Only `'stateful'` was added; no values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Button icon-children-to-prop
**No change needed.** Both `<Button>` instances (lines 715-722 and 724-730) contain only text children (`{t('Connect')}` and `{t('Cancel')}`), not icon elements. The rule requires moving icon content to the `icon` prop, but there are no icons to move.

### Fix 3 — HelperTextItem icon-children-to-prop
**No change needed.** All three `<HelperTextItem>` instances (lines 298, 489, 499) contain only text children (translation strings), not icon elements. The rule requires moving icon content to the `icon` prop, but there are no icons to move.

### Companion test file
**No changes needed.** Since no source code modifications were made, the test file at `CreateScaleSystem.spec.tsx` remains correct as-is.
